COUNSEL FOR PLAINTIFF TO PROVIDE COURT WITH COURTESY COPIES OF MOVING PAPERS BEFORE LEAVING COURT TODAY. OPPOSITION BRIEF TO BE FILED BY OCTOBER 9, 2012. REPLY BRIEF TO BE FILED BY OCTOBER 16, 2012. LAW AND MOTION 302, RULING: THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. PLAINTIFF DYNAMIC HOLDING COMPANY LLC'S MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS IS GRANTED WITH DEFENDANT BEING GIVEN TWENTY DAYS LEAVE TO FILE AN ANSWER THAT DENIES ONE OR MORE ELEMENTS OF ONE OR MORE OF PLAINTIFF'S CLAIMS AND/OR THAT ALLEGES ONE OF MORE AFFIRMATIVE DEFENSES. Off Calendar Dec-18-2012 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Mark Malachowski, Esq. of Malachowski & Associates, Tel. 415.812.1575, for plaintiff and moving party;
No other appearance.

The matter was discussed. The court vacated its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF DYNAMIC HOLDING COMPANY LLC'S MOTION TO STRIKE ANSWER TO COMPLAINT is denied without prejudice. The proof of service is defective - a Case Management Statement was served. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR # 7077.

Notice Of To Dismiss
Off Calendar Oct-22-2012 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
Mark Malachowski, Esq. of Malachowski & Associates, Tel. 415.983.0717, for plaintiff and opposing party;
No other appearance.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT LEO CHANG'S Motion To Dismiss is Denied. Defendant's motion is largely unintelligible and, to the extent that it is intelligible, it lacks merit. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not Reported.

Ntc Of Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings
Off Calendar Oct-22-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Mark Malachowski, Esq. of Malachowski & Associates, Tel. 415.983.0717, for plaintiff and moving party;
No other appearance.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF DYNAMIC HOLDING COMPANY LLC'S Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings is Granted with defendant being given twenty days leave to file an answer that denies one or more elements of one or more of plaintiff's claims and/or that alleges one of more affirmative defenses. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not Reported.
